name: Daily currency rates email report with USD→EUR/NGN & BTC/ETH price tracking

parameters.content:
💰 CURRENCY TRACKER WORKFLOW:
Get daily exchange rates delivered to your email every morning at 8 AM.

📊 CURRENCIES TRACKED:
• USD to EUR
• USD to NGN (Nigerian Naira)
• Bitcoin (BTC) to USD
• Ethereum (ETH) to USD

📧 DELIVERY:
• Professional HTML email
• Sent daily at 8:00 AM
• Includes percentage changes
• Mobile-friendly format

🌍 FIAT CURRENCY RATES:
Fetches USD exchange rates from a free API.

📡 API Used: ExchangeRate-API
• Free, no signup required
• Updates multiple times daily
• Reliable and fast

💱 Returns rates for:
• EUR (Euro)
• NGN (Nigerian Naira)
• 168+ other currencies

🔧 No configuration needed - just works!

₿ CRYPTOCURRENCY PRICES:
Fetches Bitcoin and Ethereum prices from CoinGecko.

📡 API Used: CoinGecko
• Free, reliable crypto data
• Includes 24hr price changes
• No API key required

💰 Returns:
• Bitcoin (BTC) price in USD
• Ethereum (ETH) price in USD
• 24-hour percentage change
• Real-time market data

🎨 EMAIL FORMATTING:
This JavaScript code creates a beautiful HTML email with all currency data.

✨ Features:
• Professional design with gradients
• Mobile-responsive layout
• Color-coded price changes (green/red)
• Proper number formatting
• Both HTML and plain text versions

📧 Email Contains:
• Daily date in subject line
• Fiat rates: USD→EUR, USD→NGN
• Crypto prices: BTC, ETH with 24hr changes
• Professional footer with timestamps

📨 EMAIL DELIVERY:
Sends your beautiful currency report via email.

🔧 SETUP REQUIRED:
1. Change 'your-email@gmail.com' to your sender email
2. Change 'recipient@email.com' to where you want the report sent
3. Configure SMTP credentials (Gmail, Outlook, etc.)

📧 GMAIL SETUP:
• SMTP Server: smtp.gmail.com
• Port: 587
• Use App Password (not regular password)

✅ Ready to receive daily currency updates at 8 AM!
